chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 723 of 2024 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.2745/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.2746/2024 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 22.05.2024 Mr. Faiz Muhammad Shar, Advocate for petitioners >>>>>..<<<<< 1. Urgency is granted. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just exception. 2&4. Petitioners, claimed to be allottees of different plots in Sindh Goth Abad Scheme, District Khairpur, claim that respondent No.2 a Head Master of the school is causing hindrance to constructions made over said plots by bringing students of his school. Respondent No.2 is a Civil Servant and it appears that petitioners without approaching his higher authorities have directly filed this petition without any proof showing that he has been hindering in possession, if any, of the petitioners over alleged plots. No case, either on merits or maintainability of this petition before this Court has been made out, and accordingly, this petition is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge ARBROHI
